_comment: Samples for memory_bounds.estimate_tokens tests (Story 10.4a AC #8/#13). cl100k_tokens captured via tiktoken.get_encoding('cl100k_base').encode(text) on 2026-04-24. Ukrainian entries demonstrate the documented 15-20% over-count vs real Anthropic tokenization — safe direction for a bound. Anthropic-tokenized counts are NOT captured here (would require live API access); tests assert the over-count direction, not exact Anthropic parity.

samples.name: en_short
samples.text: Hello, how much did I spend on groceries last month?

samples.name: en_long
samples.text: Looking at my November transactions, I notice a recurring payment of 299 UAH to Netflix. Should I reconsider my subscriptions?

samples.name: ua_short
samples.text: Скільки я витратив на продукти минулого місяця?

samples.name: ua_long
samples.text: Дивлячись на свої транзакції за листопад, я помічаю повторюваний платіж у 299 грн на Netflix. Чи варто переглянути підписки?

samples.name: mixed
samples.text: My balance: 15000 грн. Last transaction: Coffee Shop — 120 UAH.

samples.name: en_with_code
samples.text: Run: SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE amount > 1000;
